events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the observed torque sequence violation (not following the specified star/spiral pattern) is a **fail** — risk **high**. Fasteners already run out of sequence must be fully backed off and re-torqued in the correct multi-pass star/spiral pattern per the OEM/engineering spec before the joint can be accepted, since sequence violations risk uneven gasket compression and flange distortion even if individual torque values look correct.
